name: 911: Prey
short_description: You’ve been kidnapped by a cannibal maniac—again. Hide, solve puzzles, and cover your tracks to avoid being caught in his terrifying house. Every choice matters. Escape is possible, but only one ending leads to freedom. Will you survive the nightmare?
detailed_description:
💀 911: Prey – A first-person horror escape game of hide-and-seek, survival, and deadly secrets.

You've been kidnapped… again. The maniac cannibal has dragged you back to his terrifying home 🏚️, and your nightmare begins once more. Now it’s up to you to stay out of sight, stay smart, and search for items and clues that can help you escape before you end up on tonight’s menu.

🧠 Solve challenging puzzles to unlock new areas. Stay alert and cover your tracks—if the cannibal senses something's off, your chances of survival will vanish. This time, only one ending leads to freedom… and the rest? Well, let’s just say they’re not so lucky.

🕵️ Explore every corner of the house, uncover dark secrets, and collect notes to reveal the twisted truth about Minnesota’s most feared maniac.

Features:
★ Multiple endings – Your fate depends entirely on your choices
★ Branching detective story – A dark and mysterious narrative
★ Escape room-style puzzles – Think fast, solve smart
★ Hide-and-seek horror gameplay – Don’t leave any trace
★ Immersive atmosphere – Detailed environment and chilling sound design

Every decision counts. Every detail matters. Can you escape alive?

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian*, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Swedish, Japanese, Malay, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
